prerequisites: A personal access token generated from your Calendly account to populate the api_key field.
A start_date value defining the earliest point from which the connector should sync data.

authMethods.name: Personal access token (API key)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single api_key secret, which is a Calendly personal access token. Calendly API v2 accepts the token as a bearer token on each API request. Generate the token from within your Calendly account and paste it into the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Generate a personal access token
setupSteps.body: Create a personal access token from within your Calendly account using the API and integrations settings. Copy the token value when it is shown, as it is used to authenticate every request.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_key
setupSteps.body: Paste the personal access token into the connector's api_key field. This is the only secret the connector requires.

setupSteps.title: Configure the sync window
setupSteps.body: Set start_date to the earliest date from which data should be synced (required). Optionally set lookback_days to control how far back each incremental sync re-reads data.
